race.comment: POSTWAR (6) lived right up to market expectation last time at Albury when sitting on speed before stretching out and putting a gap to them in the straight. Strips fitter and gets the key booking of Loy. Can win again. BRIAL ROSE (2) kept them all at bay two back when sent forward on the home track but couldn't repeat the dose last time at Bendigo. Easier here and gets an important 2kg claim. Can't knock the form of BRUTAL FORCE (3) either as he shoots for the hat-trick. The form around him is stacking up and he finally draws a gate. Have to take seriously. WITCH OF NOVEMBER (14) is yet to land his second winning blow but has been showing glimpses. If she can land closer she's in the mix.
